title: Implement tower extension field architecture for GF(p^n)
description: Implement recursive tower extension fields for GF(p^n). Construct e.g. GF(p^12) as GF(p) -> GF(p^2) -> GF(p^6) -> GF(p^12) using Karatsuba multiplication for degree-2 and Toom-Cook for degree-3 extensions. Use wide accumulators with lazy/delayed reduction.
